name: Fig Walnut Puffs
recipeIngredient: 22 California dried figs, stewed and drained
Sweetened whipped cream or top milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Set aside 6 whole stewed figs for topping.
2. Puree or mash the remaining figs, removing stems first.
3. Whip egg whites until very stiff.
4. Add vanilla to the egg whites and whip in sugar slowly.
5. By hand, fold in the figs and broken walnut meats.
6. Place the mixture into an unbuttered baking pan or casserole dish.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (325°F) for about 45 minutes, or until puffed and delicately firm.
8. Serve warm in dessert dishes, topping each with a whole fig and walnut half.
9. Pass sweetened whipped cream or top milk alongside.
